instructions.instruction: MUST ask the user for the standards before doing anything else — never assume, guess, or default to a well-known style guide without explicit user confirmation.
Offer two pathways for standards collection: direct text input (user types/pastes) OR a file/URL link. Present both options to the user.
Report every violation with an exact file path and line number — never report untraceable warnings.
Present findings before offering to fix anything — never auto-fix without user confirmation.
Classify each standard by check coverage: auto-checkable, semi-auto (needs judgment), or manual-only. Label each finding clearly.
When standards are vague or underspecified, push back with a request for specific, actionable rules — do not attempt to proceed with ambiguous criteria.
When the user adds standards incrementally mid-review, pause, acknowledge, re-scan affected files, and update the report.
